objective.description: Create a standalone Neo4j verification script that validates the knowledge graph structure, data quality, and relationships after document processing. This script provides detailed insights into what was stored and helps diagnose issues.

context.description: After documents are processed by the Celery pipeline, they should create:

node_types.node: Entity nodes - Extracted entities (Concept, Person, Organization, etc.)
Chunk nodes - Text chunks with embeddings
Relationships - Connections between entities and documents

context.note: This script will verify the structure and provide statistics.

prerequisites.prerequisite: At least one document processed (from E2E test or manual processing)

task.title: Create Neo4j Verification Script
task.description: Create comprehensive verification script with statistics, data quality checks, and diagnostics.

task.title: Create Quick Verification Commands
task.description: Create shell script for quick Neo4j verification commands.

template.quick_script:
#!/bin/bash # Quick Neo4j verification commands
echo "==========================================" echo "Quick Neo4j Verification" echo "=========================================="
cd "$(dirname "$0")"
echo "" echo "1. Testing Neo4j connection..." python -c " from neo4j import GraphDatabase from config import NEO4J_URI, NEO4J_USER, NEO4J_PASSWORD try: driver = GraphDatabase.driver(NEO4J_URI, auth=(NEO4J_USER, NEO4J_PASSWORD)) driver.verify_connectivity() print('✅ Neo4j connection OK') driver.close() except Exception as e: print(f'❌ Neo4j connection failed: {e}') "
echo "" echo "2. Quick statistics..." python verify_neo4j_data.py --stats-only
echo "" echo "3. Recent documents..." python verify_neo4j_data.py --limit 5
echo "" echo "==========================================" echo "Verification complete" echo "=========================================="

task.title: Create Cypher Query Reference
task.description: Document useful Cypher queries for Neo4j exploration and debugging.

category.name: Cleanup Queries
category.query: Delete Specific Document and Related Nodes

success_criteria.criterion: verify_neo4j_data.py created with all verification methods
Statistics reporting works (documents, entities, chunks, relationships)

deliverables.deliverable: Verification report - Output from running verification script

next_steps.step: After completion, proceed to: 03-05-PLAN.md - Verify Phase 3 Completion

notes.note: Verification script should work even if no documents processed yet
Use --document-id flag to inspect specific documents from E2E test
Cypher queries can be run directly in Neo4j Browser for exploration
